query: SELECT table_schema, count(*) as cnt FROM information_schema.tables GROUP BY table_schema ORDER BY cnt DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2t5rixfHAYLQmtB.82d4504e1c85 --database 8HPhiZd2Eco6WRGckejsZr --execute SELECT table_schema, count(*) as cnt FROM information_schema.tables GROUP BY table_schema ORDER BY cnt DESC;
